TBTK.PartyHud.Title: Party
TBTK.Settings.HudEnabled.Name: Enable Party HUD
TBTK.Settings.HudEnabled.Hint: Show the Party HUD panel on the game canvas.
TBTK.Settings.RestrictToHpOnly.Name: Restrict player visibility
TBTK.Settings.RestrictToHpOnly.Hint: When enabled, players only see HP bars for other party members. When disabled (default), players see full data for everyone.
